analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with incomplete UI implementations. The event.json specifies a black holes theme with animated objects, slides, and pages. Current files have partial implementations with syntax errors and missing content. The theme should focus on cosmic/dark visuals with animations representing black holes, gravitational effects, and space phenomena.

improvements.description: Complete HTML structure with sections for black hole information, animated slides, and interactive cosmic elements
Implement dark cosmic theme with black hole animations, swirling patterns, glowing effects, and space-themed color palette
Fix syntax errors and implement animated slide functionality, black hole interactions, and cosmic particle effects
